title: CriticWorkPacket
description: Schema for a CriticWorkPacket — a static contract defining critic evaluation of a candidate artifact. Candidate only, no live model execution in B4.

modelworkpacket_ref.description: Reference to the ModelWorkPacket whose output is being evaluated

candidate_artifact_ref.description: Reference to the candidate artifact being evaluated

scale_ladder_route_class.description: Scale ladder route class of the evaluated candidate

critic_tier.description: Critic tier selected based on route class

critic_rules.description: Rules the critic applies during evaluation

minicheck_refs.description: References to minicheck results for this candidate

output_contract_ref.description: Reference to the output contract for the evaluated artifact

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary — what this critic does and does not prove

candidate_only.description: Must be true — critic output is advisory/candidate only

non_claims.description: Explicit list of things this critic does not claim or prove
